test_frontend.detail: 103 tests across 6 test files all passed

test_backend.detail: 60 tests passed, 1 expected warning about missing atlas regions (L/R Medial_wall in nilearn)

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Suggestions API Quirks' section: non-array fields in response data (message, etc.); schema API returns integer ordinal parameter names for some predicates; engine state mutation from compute_datalog_program_for_autocompletion; engine.scope protection pattern
Added nilearn label format change (>= 0.10) and expected 'Missing atlas regions' warning documentation

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention note: React integration tests (App.test.tsx) should not assert on placeholder text that originates from a child component, as this creates fragile coupling. Tests should mock child components or target structural elements (e.g., aria-labels, test-ids).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: predicate-browser-panel review: App.test.tsx checked for 'Engine not selected' text which happened to be rendered by PredicateBrowser's no-engine state — the test passed coincidentally. If PredicateBrowser's wording changes, App.test.tsx will fail without any change to App logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note to the 'Backend first' step: if the feature's preconditions include a completed backend feature, skip backend implementation steps and go directly to frontend tests. Also clarify that agent-browser verification is required for UI components and direct dev-server verification is acceptable only when agent-browser is not available.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: predicate-browser-panel and suggestions-panel-ui reviews both noted workers silently skipped backend TDD steps because the backend was already provided by a prior feature. The skill's procedure does not document this common scenario, causing worker skillFeedback to incorrectly report full procedure compliance.

rejectedObservations.observation: visual-query-builder-core: computeSharedVariables not memoized in QueryContext.tsx (performance concern)
rejectedObservations.reason: Premature optimization for typical neuroimaging query sizes (small number of predicates). Not worth adding guidance for.
Acknowledged but very unlikely to cause issues in production. Tests correctly reset it. Reject as library guidance — too implementation-specific.

rejectedObservations.observation: suggestions-panel-ui: redundant type cast in success path
rejectedObservations.reason: Trivial cosmetic issue, not worth documenting anywhere.

rejectedObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill: agent-browser vs direct dev-server verification ambiguity
rejectedObservations.reason: Rolled into the fullstack-worker skill suggestion above as part of the same pattern. Rejecting as separate item.
